name: marknote
description: Connect Codex to a local MarkNote Markdown library.

interface.shortDescription: Search and safely edit your MarkNote library.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the Markdown library selected in MarkNote. Search, read, create, update, and archive notes with revision-conflict protection.
defaultPrompt: 搜索我的 MarkNote 笔记并总结相关内容。
根据我的 MarkNote 笔记整理一份复习提纲。
在我确认后，把这段内容保存为新的 MarkNote 笔记。
